title: Add AI Clip Master to Creative
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Mastering the clips
gist.blurb: New in the showcase: AI Clip Master. A modular toolkit for slicing, dicing, and processing video with AI.
gist.summary: Added AI Clip Master, a modular video processing tool for content creators, to the Creative apps collection.
gist.impact: Users gain access to a new Streamlit-based tool for AI-assisted video editing and processing.
gist.visual_concept: Video editing theme. Polly the bee and the robot working on a physical film strip that glows with code/magic. The robot holding pixel scissors represents the 'clip' aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and the cute robot editing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) film strip. The robot holds a pair of pixel scissors. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
